title: calycanthus mohrii
intro: Calycanthus mohrii, also known as Eastern Sweetshrub, is a flowering plant native to the southeastern United States. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and providing relief from skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Calycanthus mohrii typically include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
